data.body: compliable-stretchy-bee (e72b): added no-commit-to-branch pre-commit hook to .pre-commit-config.yaml with explicit --branch main --branch master. Plan-review PASSED+signed (re-signed after adding explicit-args per T3 advisory). Claimed, edited, all 4 ACs verified (hook rejects main exit1, passes feature exit0; lint+mypy green). Committed as bot w/ DCO+rebar-ticket trailer. Pushed to Gerrit change 720. Awaiting LLM-Review + Verified votes before submit+close.
